channel.title: GX on BurningXFlame
channel.description: Recent content in GX on BurningXFlame

item.title: Intro
item.description: GX - Go eXtended lib GX is a Go eXtended lib to improve productivity, performance, reliability and security of your products at ease.

item.title: Pricing
item.description: Pricing and Licensing Base Pro Enterprise License Open Source License ↗ Commercial Developer License Commercial Organization License Use GX to Build Open Source Projects Commercial Products Commercial Products Number of Licensed Developers - 1 Unlimited Support - Email Email Buy ↗ Buy ↗ With the purchase of a commercial license:
